creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Currently we have "base + <commit hash>" which will be converted to https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=<commit hash> , so as ports and doc. While "base" is the terminology of src repository in svn, in git it is named "src".

Can we also have a "src + <commit hash>" syntax for https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=<commit hash> ?
